purpose: Skill-selection eval: a cheap model sees ONLY the compact one-line skills list and must pick the right skill for each utterance. Rerun on ANY description change; top-1 accuracy must not regress and must stay >= 0.95 overall. Disambiguation pairs reported separately.

gold price today
AAPL quote and 1y history
ETH market cap vs SOL
